name: shopping-list-monorepo
description: A full-stack shopping list application with Next.js frontend and GraphQL backend

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w shopping-list-client" "npm run dev -w shopping-list-server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shopping-list-client && npm run build -w shopping-list-server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w shopping-list-client && npm run lint -w shopping-list-server
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w shopping-list-client && npm run lint:fix -w shopping-list-server
scripts.format: npm run format -w shopping-list-client && npm run format -w shopping-list-server
scripts.clean: rimraf apps/*/node_modules apps/*/.next apps/*/dist && rimraf node_modules

author: kenmckaba
